report.summary: Cycle-close v15: 37 pages published today across 17 batches — all verified with page.tsx. Publish queue empty. 6/6 API routes healthy with correct cache TTLs. git index.lock STILL blocking commits (since 09:58) — 80 pending changes stuck. No new deploy this cycle.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: 520 unique published slugs total, 417 with page.tsx — 103 legacy gaps unchanged from prior cycles
All 37 pages published today (batches 1-17) verified: every page.tsx file exists
Batch 17 (latest): Ethereum Verkle Trees & Hegota Guide 2026 + Sui Hashi Bitcoin DeFi Guide — both scaffolded at 14:23 today
6 modified learn pages in working tree (bitgo-ipo, congressional-hearing, institutional-adoption, katana-perps, lido-v3, tokenized-funds) — likely JSX escaping fixes from earlier cycles
10 new OG SVGs generated (untracked) for recent batches including ai-agent-frameworks, rwa-platforms, nasdaq-tokenized-equities, socialfi-creator-tokens, etc.
Production site unreachable from sandbox (egress blocked) — cannot verify HTTP 200 remotely; local page.tsx audit is green
No new regressions detected from static file analysis

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: 6/6 core API routes present and structurally sound: prices (60s), fear-greed (600s), trending (300s), market-metrics (60s), market-dominance (300s), defi-yields (300s)
All routes implement in-memory cache + Cache-Control + stale-while-revalidate + fallback data pattern
Health endpoint (/api/health) rate-limited at 100 req/min, checks CoinGecko, analytics, and cache services
Additional API routes available: cache-stats, news-rss, newsletter, notifications, og, subscribe, standup-email
No code changes to API routes this cycle — all stable
No rate limit or stale data issues detectable from code analysis — live verification blocked by sandbox egress

sections.title: DevOps
items: Latest deployed commit: 21aaf5b (batch deploy: 170+ pages, 18 guides, 5 ecosystem pages, OG images, UX fixes)
No new deploy triggered this cycle — all current changes are local only
BLOCKER PERSISTS: .git/index.lock created at 09:58 today — still blocking all git operations after 4+ hours
Working tree: 21 modified files + 59 untracked files = 80 total pending changes
Modified files include: published-pages.ts (37 new pages today), globals.css, NotificationCenter, WhaleAlertFeed, 6 learn page fixes, 5 OG SVG updates, 5 report updates
next.config.ts healthy: standalone output, staticGenerationMaxConcurrency=4, image optimization with AVIF/WebP
ACTION NEEDED: rm .git/index.lock → stage all changes → commit → trigger Vercel deploy to push 17 batches live

sections.title: Project Manager
items: SHIPPED: 37 pages added to published-pages.ts today across 17 batches (learn guides + 5 ecosystem deep-dives + 1 funding-rate-tracker tool)

PUBLISH QUEUE: Empty — all queued pages have been promoted to PUBLISHED_PAGES

CARRY-OVER: Resolve git index.lock, commit 80 pending changes, trigger Vercel deploy
CARRY-OVER: Fix JSX escaping TS errors in 6 learn pages (unescaped > and $ characters)
CARRY-OVER: 103 published slugs without page.tsx (long-standing legacy gap — wallets, taxes, investing, blog, older learn guides)
BLOCKER FOR JEFE: git index.lock must be cleared before any deploy can proceed — this has persisted all day across 15+ review cycles
